title: Irenea viminale
taxonomy: Irena viminale is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is commonly found in tropical Asia, particularly in India, Sri Lanka, and parts of Southeast Asia. The plant is native to the region's forests and is often found growing in shaded areas. Irena viminale is a relatively small shrub that produces clusters of small, white flowers. The classification of Irena viminale is that of a flowering plant belonging to the family Rubiaceae.
